name: TOXIC PULSE
short_description: TOXIC PULSE is a relentless bullet hell survival FPS. No cover, no regeneration — just you and an escalating nightmare. Dodge diving aerial threats and crushing monoliths in a constantly evolving arena. Every wave demands perfect aim and lightning reflexes. Can you survive until Wave 10?
detailed_description:
TOXIC PULSE is a fast-paced arena shooter where standing still means death. Trapped in a shifting void, your only goal is to survive the escalating chaos.

💀 SURVIVE THE PULSE

Enemies spawn from unstable Portals that tear through reality. The difficulty ramps up with every minute.

  • Waves 1-2: The slaughter begins. The Meat horde floods the arena, joined quickly by aerial threats.

  • Waves 3-4: Heavy units arrive. You must balance between clearing the swarm and dodging heavy attacks.

  • Waves 5-9: Total chaos. Jumping monoliths and poison towers control the battlefield.

  • WAVE 10: The ultimate test of endurance.

👹 THE BESTIARY

Every enemy type demands a different reaction:

  • The Meat (Waves 1-10): Weak fodder that overwhelms you with sheer numbers. Don't let them corner you.

  • Aerial Scourge (Waves 2-10): Flying pests that hover above and dive-bomb you when you least expect it. Look up!

  • Tanks (Waves 3-10): Massive, high-health brutes. They don't just soak up damage — they perform deadly dashes to close the distance instantly.

  • Statues (Waves 5-10): They don't just stand there. These monoliths jump towards you and release expanding rings of fire upon landing. Jump or burn.

  • Serpents (Waves 6-10): Static, turret-like creatures rooted to the spot. They control zones of the arena by spitting lethal poison from a distance.

⚡ FEATURES

  • Skill-Based Movement: You need to bunnyhop and strafe to avoid the diving flyers and expanding fire rings.

  • Global Leaderboards: Compete with players worldwide.

  • Steam Achievements: Prove your mastery by reaching Wave 10.

    Die and try again instantly.
